title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Unlocking a new win-condition in Standard.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a blue/red Room control deck, featuring Central Elevator // Promising Stairs, Roaring Furnace // Steaming Sauna and Smoky Lounge // Misty Salon from Duskmourn in Standard.
